node.text:
Just Launched: The NikeSKIMS Rift Mesh. A sleek and minimal remix of a tabi-toe icon.

Available now on SKIMS.com, Nike.com, and in select SKIMS and Nike retail locations across New York City and Los Angeles.

Not many get on a first-name basis with the world. Welcome to Nike, LISA.

@lalalalisa_m

Paula Badosa 🤝 Emerson Jones
Melbourne Central, LOUD and ready.
First slam energy starts here!

node.text: Sleek, minimalist, and designed for effortless movement. Complete your look to and from the studio with the NikeSKIMS Rift, arriving January 26.

The NikeSKIMS Rift Mesh.

The iconic split-toe silhouette, reimagined. The first ever footwear release from NikeSKIMS launches in North America on January 26 across Nike.com, SKIMS.com, and select SKIMS and Nike retail locations in three colorways: Black, Velvet Brown, and Archaeo Brown.

“Look good, feel good, play good.”

@zakiyahmonae_ sums up the mood for she and the other LSU Tigers joining the Nike family.

Ski slope chic in all-new @jacquemus.

The Nike x Jacquemus Après Ski Apparel Collection is now available on nike.com and SNKRS in select regions.

@erikawheaton wears NikeSKIMS Shine in Obsidian and Dark Teal.

The Shine collection features quick-dry tech and a sleek, glossy finish.

The NikeSKIMS Airy collection is built up of breathable layers designed to complete your total look—to, from, or at the gym and studio.

Shop NikeSKIMS Drop 2 now.

The energy of the night from those who conquered After Dark Tour London.

An epic race demanded an epic line-up.
This was After Dark Tour London.

node.text:
Being one of the best speed skaters in the world requires an intense training regimen. Jutta Leerdam feels comfortable and powerful in her favorite items from NikeSKIMS Drop 2.

Shop Jutta’s faves now.

A world champion speed skater, Jutta Leerdam knows that feeling good in your body makes for powerful results.  

“I want to look in the mirror and be like, it’s my day. It’s unintentionally a powerful thing, I think, If you see yourself in the mirror [before a race] and you look good, you will get that confidence boost and skate faster.”

Shop NikeSKIMS Drop 2 now.

NikeSKIMS Shine is a sleek, lightweight material with a subtle sheen. Featuring quick-dry properties and four-way stretch, it’s designed to move with you.   Shop all-new colorblocked and solid Shine styles in NikeSKIMS Drop 2.

node.text:
Shop Drop 2 now.  
Don’t compromise. NikeSKIMS is designed to look good while you work hard, featuring gently sculpting performance fabrics and outer layers to complete your look.

Just Dropped—NikeSKIMS Drop 2. Redefine your sport style with new innovative silhouettes, accessories, and seasonal colors.

Shop now at Nike.com, SKIMS.com, and select Nike and SKIMS retail locations.

The NikeSKIMS Weightless Collection is made with semi-sheer, quick-dry fabrics designed to flatter your figure on their own or as layers. 

Shop Drop 2 on November 13th.
